title: Critic Comparison Matrix
description: JSON shape of the `matrix` artifact produced by the Critic agent (SPEC §6.2, docs/agents/critic.md). Mirrors MatrixModel / PaperExtraction in backend/app/agents/critic.py. Every approved paper appears as exactly one row; no paper is silently dropped.

rows.description: One extraction row per paper in the approved pool.

paperExtraction.description: Per-paper extracted attributes — one row of the comparison matrix.

citation_key.description: BibTeX citation key — unique within the project. Always present.

problem.description: The research problem the paper addresses. Empty string if the extraction failed.

method.description: The method or approach the paper uses.

dataset.description: The dataset(s) the paper evaluates on.

key_findings.description: The paper's key results or findings.

limitations.description: The limitations the paper acknowledges or that the Critic identifies.

extraction_failed.description: True if the per-paper LLM extraction failed. The row is still present (invariant: no paper is dropped); the five attribute fields are empty and `error` carries the cause.

error.description: The failure reason when `extraction_failed` is true; null otherwise.
